word: G1641 - ἐλαττονέω - elattonéō - el-at-ton-eh-o - Have lack

sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἐλαττονέω

- Transliteration: Elattoneo

- Phonetic: el-at-ton-eh-o

- Definition:

1. to be less, inferior, (in possessions)

2. to make less, diminish

- Origin: from G1640

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1640; to diminish that is fall short: - have lack.
